title: Pacs United bows the knee to Cavaliers
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE - Last Saturday, Knysna Cavaliers became the fist team this season to record a victory against the defending champions, Pacaltsdorp United. Cavaliers, who posted 197 thanks to half centuries by JP Ellis (67) and Keenan Vieira (55), won by 77 runs after Pacaltsdorp was dismissed for only 120. With this victory Cavaliers, together with Union Stars I and II, will now battle it out for the second and third place and qualification for the qualifier to determine the second finalist.

Union Stars II (152 all out) beat George (143 all out) by 9 runs while Union Stars I (102/8) recorded a two-wicket victory against Mossel Bay (99 all out). For Mossel Bay, Arno Moolman (6/23) excelled with the ball.

Plett Pioneers 292 (all out) moved away from the relegation zone thanks to a 177-run victory against Harlequins Forces (175 all out). Kyle Jacobs (104) was the hero for Pioneers with a fine century.

The summarised score cards are:

Knysna Cavaliers vs Pacaltsdorp United

KNYSNA CAVALIERS - 197 all out (46,5 overs) (JP Ellis 67, Keenan Vieira 55, Matthew Thorne 3/33, Heath Richards 3/34, Ricardo Majolla 2/30)

PACALTSDORP UNITED - 120 all out (41,5 overs) (Matthew Thorne 34, Randy Wesso 23, AB van der Walt 3/26, JP Ellis 2/13, Blake Linder 2/16)

Knysna Cavaliers won by 77 runs.

Union Stars II vs George

UNION STARS II - 152 all out (45 overs) (Breyton Arries 32, Welton Verlaat 27, Ziano Lewis 24*, Ayabonga Anthony 4/18, Mark Adrianatos 2/11, Geronovan Erasmus 2/31)

GEORGE - 143 all out (40,1 overs) (Mark Adrianatos 30, Werner Botha 21, Yamkela Xakani 4/13, Lee Henry Meyer 2/19, Envirino Swartz 2/36)

Union Stars II won by 9 runs.

Mossel Bay vs Union Stars I

MOSSEL BAY - 99 all out (29,5 overs) (Reagan Rhoode 3/12, Shannon Opperman 3/26, Hershell America 2/28)

UNION STARS I - 102/8 (27,4 overs) Hershell America 22*, Breyton Plaatjies 22, Arno Moolman 6/23, Kwezi Gumede 2/30)

Union Stars I won by 2 wickets.

Plett Pioneers vs Harlequins Forces

PLETT PIONEERS - 292 all out (49,2 overs) (Kyle Jacobs 104, Jean du Plessis 38, Mark Vermeulen 33, Jacques Campher 3/26, Wayne Witbooi 3/69, Deano Pietersen 2/50)

HARLEQUINS FORCES - 175 all out (30,2 overs) (Jacques Campher 41, Marshelino Plaatjies 34, Lesley Maksella 26, Jozay Swarts 20*, Wayne Oraai 4/34, Marcello Piedt 3/33, Mbuyiseli Malanga 2/51)

Plett Pioneers won by 117 runs.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
